Notes: Android uses Material ripple; iOS uses highlight state with opacity change
Border width 1dp on Android/Flutter; iOS uses system bordered style with tint color
Android shows character counter below; iOS uses inline clear button; Flutter supports both via decoration
iOS auto-shows cancel button on focus; Android uses back arrow; Flutter SearchAnchor provides suggestions overlay
Android Card has default 1dp elevation; iOS uses shadow with offset; Flutter Card clip behavior differs by shape
iOS has swipe actions built-in; Android uses Dismissible composable; Flutter ListTile has leading/trailing slots
iOS supports detents (.medium/.large); Android has half/full expand; Flutter needs DraggableScrollableSheet for detents
iOS buttons are horizontal by default; Android stacks vertically when text is long; Flutter follows Material spec
iOS has no native snackbar — use custom view or SPM package; Android auto-dismisses after 4s; Flutter supports action button
iOS tab bar at bottom with labels; Android supports animated indicator; Flutter NavigationBar replaces BottomNavigationBar
iOS large title collapses on scroll; Android has CenterAligned/MediumTopAppBar variants; Flutter SliverAppBar for collapsing
iOS has no native FAB — implement as floating UIButton with shadow; position 16dp from edges on all platforms
Android supports checkmark for selection; iOS needs custom implementation; Flutter has InputChip for deletable chips
Use placeholder initials when image fails to load; Android uses Coil/Glide; iOS uses URLSession or Kingfisher
iOS uses ProgressView with .circular style; Android Material spinner; Flutter supports both determinate and indeterminate
Center vertically in scrollable area; include illustration + title + subtitle + optional CTA button on all platforms
Always show retry button; use platform error colors; include error code for support; log error details to analytics
